projectDescription: A role-based gym management platform for Universidad Santa María that lets students book training sessions, track fitness profiles, and view routines, while coaches and admins manage schedules, attendance, and users.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with three user types: Student (Alumno), Coach (Entrenador), and Admin
Session booking system with capacity management and overflow slots for selected athletes
Personal fitness profile with weight, height, injuries, and objectives tracked per student
Routine builder for coaches to create global or personalized training plans with exercises
Attendance tracking system for coaches to mark presence/absence per training block
Student records viewer for coaches to review physical files and add coach notes
Admin schedule management with a master gym open/close toggle and closure messages
User permission management for assigning roles and sports branch (sports selection) status
JWT-based authentication using Chilean RUT as the username identifier
Accordion-style weekly schedule grouped by day for an intuitive booking UX
publicApiSurface: POST /api/token/ — Obtain JWT access and refresh tokens
GET /api/usuarios/me/ — Get current authenticated user profile
GET /api/usuarios/ — List all users (admin/coach)
PATCH /api/usuarios/{id}/actualizar_permisos/ — Update user role and sports selection
GET /api/bloques/ — List available training blocks
PATCH /api/bloques/{id}/modificar_bloque/ — Update block capacity and assigned coach
DELETE /api/bloques/{id}/ — Delete a training block
GET /api/bloques/{id}/reservas_hoy/ — Get reservations for a specific block
POST /api/reservas/ — Create a new session reservation
POST /api/reservas/{id}/cancelar/ — Cancel a reservation
POST /api/reservas/{id}/marcar_asistencia/ — Mark attendance for a reservation
GET /api/reservas/ — List user's reservations
GET /api/fichafisica/ — Get physical fitness file
POST /api/fichafisica/ — Create a physical fitness file
PATCH /api/fichafisica/{id}/ — Update a physical fitness file
GET /api/fichafisica/por_alumno/?alumno_id={id} — Get a student's fitness file (coach)
PATCH /api/fichafisica/{id}/actualizar_nota/ — Update coach notes on a fitness file
GET /api/planes/ — List training plans visible to the user
POST /api/planes/ — Create a new training plan
GET /api/ejercicios/ — List exercise catalog
POST /api/ejercicios/ — Add an exercise to the catalog
POST /api/detallerutina/ — Add an exercise to a training plan
GET /api/configuracion/ — Get gym configuration (open/close status)
PATCH /api/configuracion/ — Update gym configuration
